programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew and Khia play matchmaker for Sebastian; at work, Camille struggles with a firing spree; Ramesh helps Leo unclog his mind palace.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew tests Leo's ability to walk to school alone; Camille takes a Khia bra shopping; Ramesh takes a stand at Bubble Bae when he learns he's not a regular customer.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew and Camille try to relive their very first date as Sam babysits Leo; Khia struggles with what to write in Mannix's birthday card.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Khia's guidance counselor helps Andrew make a big decision; Camille struggles to cater an event; Hudson and Ramesh help Cathy with her taxes.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: A group of raccoons distracts Andrew from his school work; Camille and Barb team up to catch a graffiti bandit; Ramesh struggles to understand Khia's connection to Pride.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: As they celebrate Vietnamese Lunar New Year, Andrew worries about his parents' relationship; Camille pitches her business to Andrew's mother; the kids get into trouble with their business startup.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew and Camille use game nights to help Hudson; Ramesh worries Barb doesn't think he's expressive enough; Khia plans a movie night for Mannix.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Determined to prove they're cool, Andrew and Camille have a night on the town; Leo helps Hudson face the music; Ramesh and Sebastian play backgammon.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrews brings together the neighborhood as his perfect graduation plans are threatened; Camille wants to quit her job; Khia gets bad news from Mannix.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew interviews for his dream job in community development; Camille holds a focus group for her business launch.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Camille struggles with her Indian identity when a cousin visits; Andrew's on a cold case; Khia returns from Paris early.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew and Camille differ on how to help Khia get over a breakup; Sam teaches Ramesh to play golf to impress Barb.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew creates a DIY speed bump to protect the community, but it does the opposite; Camille takes on internet trolls.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: The Phams help the adult child of a beloved neighbor deal with her passing; Barb intrudes on Ramesh and Leo's fun.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Camille hosts a menu-tasting for famous guests; Andrew refuses money from his parents, even though times are tight.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Camille can't handle it when Ramesh wants to sell her childhood home; Andrew tries to improve things at Hudson's office.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew tries to leave with the kids so Camille can do an important livestream; a snowstorm doesn't make that easy.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew organizes Rockridge's Lunar New Year festival, and an unwanted guest shows up; Camille starts a curry war.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Camille and Andrew help family look for a new place to live; their memories differ about when they bought their current home.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew and Camille have different techniques in teaching Khia how to drive; Sam uses Leo to network for a job.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew and Camille hope to enjoy a wedding responsibility free, but get pulled into family drama and old beefs.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Camille's big TV audition reveals a rift with Sam; Andrew has a tough choice to make about which career path to follow.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: The annual yard sale brings an unexpected moral dilemma for Andrew, as Camille deals with Ramesh's overbearing presence.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew and Camille search for a new family doctor; Khia meets her ex's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew struggles to create a core Canadian memory on the Phams' first cottage getaway.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew struggles to train Leo for the basketball team tryouts, and Camille discovers the cooking gene skipped Khia.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Camille wages a war on her noisy neighbors, and Andrew tries to start an early-hours nightclub at Bubble Bae.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: On Halloween, the Phams face a choice: cling to old traditions or embrace new ideas of family fun.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Camille tries to provoke Khia's teenage rebellion, while Andrew tests his parents' skills to be guardians for Khia and Leo.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Camille confronts her old bully at Leo's taekwondo school, while Andrew tries to bond with Khia at life drawing class.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: It's Lunar New Year, and Andrew must mediate a fight between his mom and sister on the topic of having kids.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: On their long-awaited date day, Camille and Andrew meddle to prevent Hudson and his ex from rekindling their romance.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: As Camille's cookbook launch day unfolds in chaos, the Phams rally to save the event in a surprising and colorful twist.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew's vasectomy plan strains his friendship with Hudson, while Camille and Khia clash over buying a car.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew's summer camp project takes a hit when he trusts the wrong mentor, while Camille's cookbook soars.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Camille seeks out a permit for the neighborhood block party while Andrew asks an elusive neighbor to perform as the surprise musical guest; at Bubble Bae, Khia discovers new feelings for Mannix.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Camille and Andrew are invited to the new neighbors' pool but must cancel on Hudson first; at Bubble Bae, Khia paints a mural and seeks validation; Andrew struggles when Leo goes to overnight camp.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew competes with his sister Carol; Camille worries about Ramesh dabbling in online dating; Khia enlists Leo's help with chores.

programme.title: Run the Burbs
programme.desc: Andrew and Khia play matchmaker for Sebastian; at work, Camille struggles with a firing spree; Ramesh helps Leo unclog his mind palace.
